name: Academic Publisher Metadata Crawl Catalog
policy: Metadata-first source discovery. Respect robots, terms, rate limits, and authorization. Do not bypass paywalls, CAPTCHAs, authentication, or access controls.

publishers.api_hint: Use official publisher APIs when available/authorized; otherwise prefer Crossref/DOI metadata and public sitemap/RSS/TOC pages.
publishers.notes: API-first. Prefer Elsevier APIs, public sitemaps, RSS/TOC pages, and DOI metadata. Do not crawl paywalled full text.

publishers.api_hint: Use official publisher APIs when available/authorized; otherwise prefer Crossref/DOI metadata and public sitemap/RSS/TOC pages.
publishers.notes: Enterprise graph-ready: SpringerLink supports journal/book listing pages, book landing pages, journal volumes/issues pages, and article/chapter landing pages. Use metadata-only extraction and low rates.

enterprise_note: Publisher crawling is modeled as a navigation graph: publisher -> journal/book indexes -> journal volumes/issues or book chapters -> article/chapter landing pages -> normalized public metadata records.
